note: Advisory sandbox build. The deliverable is a read-only desktop console that composes four auditors from embedded snapshots; its proof is the repo language_gate dogfood (CHECK_OK when the console does not FAIL, CHECK_REJECTED when an overclaim is injected) plus a receipt-write guard. Never a bare governance PASS.
title: Unified Governance Console — composes the 4 desktop auditors into one parent HTML page

subject.note: Composes the 4 desktop auditors (3 DX-3 de-pinned generators + the static PR-Conflict-Resolver report) into one parent console via READ-ONLY embedded snapshots. Sources read-only; generators are NOT executed (see receipt-safety).

receipt_safety: The Registry / Motor Validator's underlying audit_automation_surface_v1.py writes a receipt into the repo's tracked receipts/ dir on every run (confirmed: scripts/audit_automation_surface_v1.py line 104-105 writes RECEIPTS/<id>.json). Running the generators live would mutate a tracked directory and is a live repo call. So the console composes embedded snapshots (auditor_snapshots.json) instead of running anything. build() writes exactly one file, into the local out/ dir. A test asserts no file appears in either language_gate/receipts or sina-governance-SSOT/receipts across a build.
what_it_proves: the parent console renders one section for each of the 4 auditors (receipt_ledger, registry_motor, staleness_gate, pr_conflict) — test asserts all four titles + card markers render and exactly 4 cards exist
building the console writes NO receipt into any tracked receipts/ dir (before/after snapshot of language_gate/receipts and sina-governance-SSOT/receipts is unchanged)
Lock 10: the generated HTML is written only to a local out/ path and carries a visible 'DO NOT PUSH — not for public hosting' banner
Tier-3 and Tier-4 autonomy tiers render LOCKED / proof-gated, never 'available'; no autonomy or guaranteed-outcome claim is made
EMPTY-SINK / STALE distinguished from CLEAN: the pr_conflict snapshot's null stats render an explicit UNPOPULATED badge plus a STALE freshness badge, never a green 0/blank
synthetic snapshot metrics carry the watermark 'SYNTHETIC — not a guaranteed claim'
theme-aware (light/dark via prefers-color-scheme + data-theme), brand-neutral, self-contained (inline CSS, no external assets/CDN)
POSITIVE — the REAL rendered console does NOT FAIL the language_gate (public surface) -> CHECK_OK (decision=WARN on undefined title-case terms only, no OVERCLAIM/BANNED_REGISTER)
NEGATIVE — a MINIMAL MUTATION of that same on-disk artifact (flip 'read-only view' -> '100% guaranteed certified autonomous') makes the gate FAIL on OVERCLAIM -> CHECK_REJECTED
minimality: reversing the single injection reproduces the clean artifact byte-for-byte (no strawman, no schema relaxation); same gate, opposite verdicts
the dogfood uses scan/decide directly, writing NO receipt into the tracked language_gate/receipts dir
locks_respected: Lock 5 append-only (sources + generators + language_gate read-only; generators NOT executed; all writes confined to catalog/builds/DX-2)
Lock 10 commercial/dashboard (generated HTML to local out/ only, visible DO-NOT-PUSH banner, tiers 3/4 LOCKED, synthetic watermark, no autonomy/outcome claim)
no live call (no network/CF/Supabase/sends; no generator subprocess against the real repo; gate run in-process with no receipt write)
multi-agent isolation (touched nothing outside catalog/builds/DX-2; did not read/stage other lanes' untracked drops)
worktree not pushed; no git write commands

results.red_run_canary: FIRED (asserting CHECK_OK on the overclaim mutant raised AssertionError, exit 0 for the canary wrapper)
results.tracked_receipt_write_on_build: none (language_gate/receipts and sina-governance-SSOT/receipts unchanged across build)
results.pollution_outside_build_dir: verified zero tracked changes outside catalog/builds/DX-2

exit_gate_B4: DX-2 done — the Unified Governance Console renders all 4 auditor sections from read-only snapshots, dogfoods clean through the language_gate, rejects an injected overclaim by minimal mutation, and provably writes no receipt into any tracked dir.
next_action: if a live view is ever wanted, wire each section to its DX-3 generator behind an operator-triggered, receipt-redirecting wrapper (never auto-run audit_automation_surface_v1.py into the tracked receipts/ dir).
